awards.title: Men's Wildcard
awards.subtitle: Biggest swing between workouts
awards.name: Aqeel Khan
awards.detail: Range: 30 percentile points between best and worst

awards.title: Men's Metronome
awards.subtitle: Most consistent across all 3 workouts
awards.name: Rahul Duragkar
awards.detail: Volatility: 3.6 — nearly the same percentile every week

awards.title: Women's Wildcard
awards.subtitle: Biggest swing between workouts
awards.name: Ai Lee Syarief
awards.detail: Range: 45 percentile points between best and worst

awards.title: Women's Metronome
awards.subtitle: Most consistent across all 3 workouts
awards.name: Kirsty Preston
awards.detail: Volatility: 2.2 — nearly the same percentile every week
